SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-27-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-27-2017 BY JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. CHING-JUNG YEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YIBO WNAG IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY HWA-SHING KWEI, CERTIFIED MANDARIN INTERPRETER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JEAN MILEFF; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YEN, CHING-JUNG IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WANG, YIBO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
(SC-105A) ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS): THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDERS: YOU MUST COME TO COURT TO BE HEARD. HEARING DATE WILL BE DEC.12.2017 AT 3:30PM IN DEPT. 506.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-12-2017 - CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO DEC-27-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CHING-JUNG YEN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT YIBO WANG IS PRESENT. THE PROOF OF SERVICE WAS NOT FILED FIVE DAYS BEFORE THE HEARING AS REQUIRED BY CCP 116.340(C). NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)

ORDER RE: CONTINUED ON THE COURTS OWN MOTION (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

ORDER ON (SC-105A) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SMALL CLAIMS). THE REQUEST IS: DENIED. EXPLANATION FOR DECISION: AT TRIAL, PLAINTIFF DID NOT MEET HER BURDEN IN ESTABLISHING SHE WAS THE OWNER OF THE CATS, BOTH OF WHICH ARE NOW IN CHINA. THIS COURT FOUND AFTER HEARING THAT THE OWNER OF THE CATS IS THIRD PARTY CHENCHAO HONG AKA HONG CHENG CHAO.
